description:
Download manager based on aria2.

Varia is a simple download manager. It uses the amazing aria2 to handle the downloads.
It supports basic functionality like continuing incomplete downloads from the previous session upon startup, pausing/cancelling all downloads at once, setting a speed limit, authentication with a username/password, setting the simultaneous download amount and setting the download directory.
- Video downloads now can be added through the browser extension.
- .torrent files can now be opened through a file manager.
- Magnet links can now be opened through a browser.
- "Checking video" dialog can now be cancelled.
- Download segments can now be adjusted through preferences. (contribution by @N0tACyb0rg)
- Scheduler config screen is now more compact and works better on smaller window sizes.
- Better crash handling.
- (Windows only) Dialog windows now properly grey out what's behind them for better legibility.
